description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical body and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly yellow with three broad white reflective stripes encircling its upper section, each showing signs of dirt and scuff marks. The surface of the cone is visibly worn, with patches of grime and abrasions, especially around the base and lower cone. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, matching the yellow color of the rest of the cone. The base is thick, flat, and slightly textured, designed to prevent tipping and provide grip on pavement. No logos or text are visible, but the cone's overall appearance suggests it has been used extensively in outdoor urban environments.
description: A yellow traffic cone with three white reflective stripes, showing visible wear and dirt, and a wide, stable base.
description_view_0: The cone's front shows heavy scuffing and dirt on the white stripes and base, with the rounded yellow tip clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side highlights more grime on the lower stripe and base, with the reflective bands appearing slightly cleaner than in other views.
description_view_2: The cone's stripes are more evenly spaced and the base appears less dirty, with fewer visible scuff marks.
description_view_3: This view shows a concentration of dirt at the base and a slightly faded appearance on the lowest white stripe.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Three wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper section of the cone, evenly spaced and each approximately 8-10 cm wide.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and yellow, with no attachments or holes.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and flat with rounded corners, made of thick plastic for stability, and shows visible wear and dirt.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cone.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, grime, and some fading on the reflective stripes and base.
